root.description: The project's canonical root at removal time.

registryRemoved.description: The durable global-registry entry (and its indexes) were removed.

journalPartitionArchived.description: Whether the project's journal partition directory was archived (renamed out of the active journal tree). False only when the partition never materialized on disk.

archivedPartitionPath.description: Absolute path the partition journal was archived to, or null when there was no partition directory to archive.

artifactsRetained.description: Run artifact trees are left in place for normal GC/retention — remove never deletes run bytes or the user's project directory.

activeRunCheck.description: How the live/queued-run fence was evaluated. Always 'snapshot': the active-run set is read once (an async daemon IPC job-list read) BEFORE the synchronous removal, so a run that starts in the narrow window between the snapshot and the removal is NOT fenced. Honest disclosure of a TOCTOU race the current architecture cannot close inside the sync section; see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.

ControlProjectRemoveReceipt.description: DELETE /v2/projects/:id receipt: registry entry removed, journal partition archived, artifacts left to GC.
